scripts.build:electron: env VITE_ELECTRON=true npm run build -w @zenith/web && npm run build -w @zenith/electron
scripts.build:electron:win: env VITE_ELECTRON=true npm run build -w @zenith/web && npm run build:win -w @zenith/electron
scripts.build:electron:mac: env VITE_ELECTRON=true npm run build -w @zenith/web && npm run build:mac -w @zenith/electron
scripts.build:electron:linux: env VITE_ELECTRON=true npm run build -w @zenith/web && npm run build:linux -w @zenith/electron
scripts.build: npm run build -w @zenith/shared && npm run build -w @zenith/analytics-sdk && npm run build -w @zenith/server && npm run build -w @zenith/web
scripts.build:demo: npm run build -w @zenith/shared && npm run build:demo -w @zenith/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @zenith/server && npm run test -w @zenith/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @zenith/server && npm run lint -w @zenith/analytics-sdk && npm run lint -w @zenith/web
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w @zenith/server && npm run lint:fix -w @zenith/analytics-sdk && npm run lint:fix -w @zenith/web
